# Slides

## Overview
Creates slide deck presentations optimized for clarity, visual impact, and effective communication. Supports various formats including PowerPoint, Google Slides, and HTML/CSS decks.

## Slide Structure
- **Title slide**: Compelling headline + subtitle
- **Agenda slide**: 3-5 main points
- **Content slides**: One idea per slide
- **Data slides**: Chart + key insight
- **Transition slides**: Section break with quote or image
- **Closing slide**: CTA + contact info

## Design Rules
- Max 30 words per slide (audience reads, not presents)
- One visual element per slide
- Consistent typography: 32-48px headings, 18-24px body
- High contrast: dark text on light background
- No AI-slop gradients or clip art
